title: Ores full Blocks!
description: This resource pack transforms all ore veins into full, solid blocks for better visibility and a distinct look.
body:
# Full Block Ores – Maximum Visibility
This resource pack is designed for players who want to make mining more efficient and visually clear. It transforms all standard ore textures from their default look into full, solid color blocks.

Whether you are speedrunning, grinding for materials, or just tired of missing that one hidden diamond vein in a dark cave, this pack ensures that every ore stands out immediately.

Features
Full Block Textures: All ores (Coal, Iron, Copper, Gold, Redstone, Lapis, Diamond, and Emerald) appear as solid blocks.

Deepslate Support: Includes full block variants for all Deepslate ores found in deeper levels.

Clean Aesthetics: Removes the stone/deepslate background for a high-contrast look.

Compatibility
Although the pack is technically set to a specific format, it is fully functional across a wide range of Minecraft versions. If the game shows a "Made for an older/newer version" warning, you can safely ignore it—the textures will still load perfectly.

## Confirmed Working Versions:

1.21.x 

1.20.x

1.19.x

1.18.x

1.17.x 
![An Image of the Pack in use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc7dd9eb7f60d29e00c69575f24ce7a2c6dd87a5.png)
